name: Tulip Festival (Keukenhof)
traditions: Viewing 7 million flower bulbs; themed gardens; flower parades; art installations; tulip workshops.
historicalBackground: Keukenhof was established in 1949 as a flower exhibition. Tulips were introduced to the Netherlands from Turkey in the 16th century, sparking 'Tulip Mania.'
description: The world's largest flower garden, showcasing 7 million tulips and spring blooms in a dazzling display of Dutch horticultural artistry.
